# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service-backend
    port: 8080
    protocol: http
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: user-api-route
        paths:
          - /users
          - /users/(.*) # Matches /users and anything under it
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true # Strips '/users' or '/users/...' before proxying
        preserve_host: false # Replaces the Host header with the upstream host
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 100
              policy: local # Or 'cluster' for distributed rate limiting
          - name: jwt
            config:
              claims_to_verify:
                - exp
                - aud # Ensure the audience claim is present and valid
          - name: correlation-id
            config:
              header_name: X-Correlation-ID
              generator: uuid
              echo_upstream_header: true
          - name: request-transformer
            config:
              add:
                headers:
                  - X-Service-Target:user-service
                  - X-Client-IP:$remote_addr # Add client IP from Nginx variable
    plugins: # Service-level plugins
      - name: prometheus
        config: {} # Collects metrics for this service
      - name: http-log # Example for logging to an HTTP endpoint
        config:
          http_endpoint: http://log-aggregator.internal/kong-logs
          method: POST
          headers:
            Content-Type: application/json
          timeout: 5000
          queue_size: 1000
          queue_flush_interval: 1

  - name: product-service
    host: product-service-backend
    port: 8081
    protocol: http
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 60000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 60000
    routes:
      - name: product-api-route
        paths:
          - /products
          - /products/(.*)
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 50
              policy: local
          - name: jwt
            config:
              claims_to_verify:
                - exp
                - aud
          - name: request-transformer
            config:
              add:
                headers:
                  - X-Service-Target:product-service
          - name: response-transformer
            config:
              add:
                headers:
                  - X-Processed-By:Kong-Gateway
                  - Cache-Control:no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate
    plugins: # Service-level plugins
      - name: prometheus
        config: {}
      - name: gzip # Compress responses from this service
        config:
          buffers:
            number: 16
            size: 8k

# Global Plugins (applied to all services/routes by default unless overridden)
plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://your-frontend.com
        - http://localhost:3000
        - http://127.0.0.1:8080
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
        - PATCH
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Custom-Header
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Custom-Header
        - X-Correlation-ID
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
  - name: ip-restriction # Example for global IP restriction
    config:
      deny:
        - 192.168.1.1/32
      # allow:
      #   - 10.0.0.0/8
  - name: proxy-cache # Example for global caching (requires a cache store configured in Kong)
    config:
      content_type:
        - text/plain
        - application/json
      cache_ttl: 60 # Cache for 60 seconds
      cache_control_header: true
      request_method:
        - GET
      vary_headers:
        - Accept
        - Accept-Encoding
      strategy: memory # Or 'redis', 'memcached'
